tests.test: Mature project cohorts earn below the cost of capital.
tests.result: not passed; required evidence remains absent

tests.test: Stressed interest coverage approaches 2.50x or net leverage approaches 5.00x.
tests.result: not yet observable or not independently reproduced

tests.test: Equity issuance is required to complete committed projects.
tests.result: not yet observable or not independently reproduced

residual_risks: Project-cohort invested capital, utilization and after-tax cash returns are not disclosed.
Customer-level MVC, dedication, renewal and termination economics are not disclosed.
Actual covenant headroom and a stressed sources-and-uses bridge are not disclosed.
strongest_failure_path: Oilfield activity slows, dedicated volumes underperform, new projects overrun, and leverage absorbs equity value before contracts can recover capital.
